full_text:
Wang Fu (Guoshan) 王甫 (國山)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Fu (王甫), styledGuoshan (國山), was born in Qi in Guanghan prefecture. Warned Guan Yu about Lü Meng, Pang Jun and an ambush but was ignored. Wang Fu was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Wang Fu lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
